title: Glowing Skeleton Eyes
description: Adds glowing eyes to the various skeletons of vanilla Minecraft, including the skeleton, wither skeleton, stray, bogged, skeleton horse, and wither skulls!
body:
Do you like playing with shaders, but hate getting shot from the darkness by those pesky skeletons? If you answered yes then this resource pack is for you!

This pack simply adds glowing eyes to all types of skeletons, making them easier to spot in the darkness.

Requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
